metadata.description: NPC daily schedule templates defining time-of-day behaviors (simplified v1.0)
notes: Defines when NPCs are available at different locations throughout the day
Time format: 24-hour clock (0-23), ranges use dash (8-18)
Availability: high (easy to interact), medium (might be busy), low (interrupt), none (unavailable/sleeping)
Simplified version - expand later with events, seasonal changes, and dynamic behaviors

merchant.name: Merchant Schedule
merchant.description: Typical merchant working day with shop open during business hours

schedule.description: Shop is open, merchant available for trading
At home eating dinner, can be interrupted

usage.assignToNPC: Add "schedule": "@social/schedules/*:merchant" field to NPC catalog entry
usage.checkAvailability: Query NPC schedule before displaying interaction options
usage.dynamicDialogue: Adjust dialogue based on current activity (busy vs relaxed)
usage.locationTracking: Use location field to determine where NPC can be found
notes: Future: Add seasonal schedule variations (harvest time, winter holidays)
Future: Event-based schedule overrides (festivals, emergencies, quests)
Future: NPC-specific schedule customization overriding templates
Future: Weather effects on schedules (farmers stay inside during storms)
Future: Player reputation affects availability (allies more available)
